## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added or updated to cover the change
- [ ] Documentation updated — `README.md` and/or `CONFIGURATION.md` reflect any new or changed behavior
- [ ] Branch is rebased on the latest `main`
- [ ] PR title and description are in English
- [ ] No personal branding, badges, or identity changes included
